heading: Condemnation of lands under laws of States
label: 357 Condemnation of lands under laws of States
text: Lands allotted in severalty to Indians may be condemned for any public purpose under the laws of the State or Territory where located in the same manner as land owned in fee may be condemned, and the money awarded as damages shall be paid to the allottee.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of the second paragraph of section 3 of act . The first paragraph of such section 3 is classified to .Mar. 3, 1901section 319 of this title
